Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1082 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 15021 0 0}{f 5 21 1 200}Hmph. Kids these days don't know how to show respect for their elders.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1082 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 200}We're their teachers. We've lived longer than them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1082 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 200}But Moriyama and her friends had to pull that on me at the very beginning of the term...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22505 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}...I'm sorry to interrupt, but I need to get back to managing the shop.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1082 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 15019 0 0}{f 5 21 1 200}Even YOU'RE shooing me away? Some way to start the school year...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1082 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 200}I don't think my nerves can take this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}You want me to order more of those cream-filled breads you like so much, right?[n]{f 1 1}
